description_long: This is a sleek, futuristic airplane with a sharply angular design and a compact, streamlined fuselage. The body is predominantly teal with bold red wings and black accents, giving it a high-tech, aggressive appearance. The wings are swept back and feature pointed tips, while the cockpit is enclosed with a dark, tinted canopy situated near the front of the fuselage. The rear of the airplane is robust, with a visible engine exhaust and no traditional tail fin, suggesting a unique tail configuration. The surface appears metallic and glossy, with visible panel lines and some wear marks, indicating use. The overall design suggests a high-speed, maneuverable craft suitable for advanced urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A compact, angular airplane with teal and red swept wings, a forward enclosed cockpit, and a glossy metallic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and wide, swept-back wings with sharp tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, angular wing structure, and the dark, enclosed cockpit canopy.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the engine exhaust, absence of a traditional tail fin, and the full wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cockpit placement and the detailed wing and fuselage geometry.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with pointed tips and no visible winglets; moderate anhedral angle.
attribute_tail_design: No traditional tail fin; integrated rear fuselage with possible unconventional or blended tail configuration.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
